name: Cyber Crush 2069
short_description: You, as a ripperdoc (self-proclaimed), have started your new clinic in a corner of Little China. With your cyberware fixing skill, will it help you to impress the girl?
detailed_description:
Year 2069, it’s a time when advanced technological and scientific achievements, such as artificial intelligence and cybernetics, have become mainstreams as part of every citizen’s life, or even body parts literally.
You, as a ripperdoc (self-proclaimed), have started your new clinic in a corner of Little China. Due to your business characteristics, you have encountered different girls with different occupations. With your cyberware fixing skill, will it help you to get rid of your 28 years of virginity?

Features:

  • HuniePop-like match 3 puzzle game with indirect matching mechanic (freely to move token in column and row)
  • Complex dating sim gameplay mixed with story-driven Visual Novel.
  • Cyber, cute and sexy girl artworks
  • Beautiful background artworks
  • Many items to unlock, craft, and collect as gifts
  • Relaxing music
